name: Satoshi API
description: A REST API for querying the Bitcoin network. Provides real-time mempool analysis, smart fee estimation, block inspection, and transaction decoding — designed to make Bitcoin node data accessible to any developer.

name: bitcoin-mcp
description: Model Context Protocol server that gives AI assistants direct access to Bitcoin network data. 32+ tools for querying blocks, transactions, and fees. Published on PyPI with 42 tests.

name: x402 Lightning
description: Added Lightning Network payment support to Coinbase's x402 protocol — enabling instant micropayments over HTTP. First external contributor to get a PR merged. 39 tests with Alby wallet interop.

name: BAIP-1
description: Bitcoin Automation Improvement Proposals — a standards framework for defining repeatable Bitcoin automation patterns. Includes a Python reference implementation with 61 tests and CI.

name: Bitcoin Core
description: Contributor to bitcoin/bitcoin, the reference implementation used by tens of thousands of nodes. Focused on test coverage improvements and functional test infrastructure.

name: OSS Contributions
description: Patches accepted by CPython, Goldman Sachs gs-quant, Microsoft qlib, scipy, and dozens more. Bug fixes, test coverage, and documentation across the Python ecosystem.
